summary: Unknown‑source recording captures a great summer‑tour ’91 show with an epic closing pair, despite a strict venue.
review: The reviewer rates the concert highly (4 ★), calling it their favorite performance of the 1991 summer tour and praising the energy of the final two songs. No comments are made about the audio quality or source, focusing instead on the venue restrictions and Jerry Garcia’s memorable stage moment.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review (4 ★) emphasizes strong show performance; no recording‑quality details are provided, limiting confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound quality, mix, or source type; only venue and performance are discussed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer describes the concert as a high‑energy summer‑tour set that built to an especially epic closing pair of songs.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Stage presence highlighted – Garcia looked directly at the reviewer and sang a lyric, creating a memorable moment.
